topics.title: Foundations of Artificial Intelligence
topics.description: Core programming concepts, logical structures and algorithms, and the data types and data structures that underpin how intelligent systems are designed.

topics.title: Machine Learning and Data Science
topics.description: How machines learn from data, preparing and organising datasets, and applying learning techniques such as classification and clustering using accessible tools.

topics.title: Knowledge Representation and Reasoning
topics.description: Rule-based systems, IF-THEN logic, decision trees, visual representation of structured data, and how computers use logic to make decisions.

topics.title: Planning and Autonomous Systems
topics.description: Intelligent agents, planning and conditional logic, autonomous routines, and how sensors and inputs guide behaviour in AI environments.

topics.title: Ethics, Society and Philosophy of AI
topics.description: Ethical issues such as bias and privacy, the social and personal impact of AI, and presenting different viewpoints on the risks of AI.

topics.title: Building and Deploying AI Systems
topics.description: Designing, building, testing, and sharing a working AI solution using accessible tools, with documentation, collaboration, and presentation skills (Paper 2 practical).
